[2020-05-19 21:18] p0lari (Polari): all vivid setups fall one short I think?
[2020-05-19 21:19] p0lari (Polari): so it's donger, plexo, and either chron, sac or fuge+cluster
[2020-05-19 21:21] awaclus: vivid+donger+chrono+sac+fuge+cluster is enough without plexo I think
[2020-05-19 21:23] p0lari (Polari): fuge and chrono are superfluous there right
[2020-05-19 21:23] .bky_1556 (bky): No need for fuge, right?
[2020-05-19 21:23] .bky_1556 (bky): Chrono's necessary to buy sacs.
[2020-05-19 21:23] .bky_1556 (bky): Animus could substitute.
[2020-05-19 21:23] p0lari (Polari): yes and you always have animus from base set
[2020-05-19 21:23] awaclus: oh, that's also true
[2020-05-19 21:24] p0lari (Polari): your non-donger budget is 9hp, with engis conduit animus you're at 7
[2020-05-19 21:24] p0lari (Polari): p1 starting drones convert to 3 vivids
[2020-05-19 21:24] .bky_1556 (bky): As long as you're using animus, a symbiote beats conduit.
[2020-05-19 21:24] awaclus: symbiote deals damage
[2020-05-19 21:25] p0lari (Polari): no it doesn't because we're trying to suicide without killing an opponent doing nothing
[2020-05-19 21:27] awaclus: can't we buy 2 clusters though
[2020-05-19 21:28] p0lari (Polari): how do the timings work out there
[2020-05-19 21:29] p0lari (Polari): I feel you can't but I also have trouble thinking this through properly because I should be either asleep or focusing on the thing I'm actually staying up late for and definitely not chatting about this dumb thing
[2020-05-19 21:30] awaclus: I'm assuming if you end the turn with no units and you've also eliminated all of the opponent's units, it's a tie
[2020-05-19 21:30] .bky_1556 (bky): I think you can win or lose mid-turn.
[2020-05-19 21:30] p0lari (Polari): are we accepting ties now
[2020-05-19 21:30] p0lari (Polari): if we go that route can't we just buy as many clusters as we want?
[2020-05-19 21:30] awaclus: we aren't accepting ties
[2020-05-19 21:31] awaclus: but 2 clusters only deal 8 damage, which is not enough to wipe out p2's starting board
[2020-05-19 21:31] p0lari (Polari): ah shit I forgot about engis again
[2020-05-19 21:31] .bky_1556 (bky): And if you have no units and haven't yet hit the button to breach for lethal, it's a loss.
[2020-05-19 21:31] p0lari (Polari): ok right we can buy 2 so vivids just barely work
[2020-05-19 21:33] awaclus: well, you don't actually lose/kill any units until you commit your turn
[2020-05-19 21:33] .bky_1556 (bky): As P1, we don't need to buy the second because we have one less drone.
[2020-05-19 21:34] p0lari (Polari): what exactly is your plan now
[2020-05-19 21:34] awaclus: vivids + engis + conduit + animus = 10 HP
[2020-05-19 21:35] .bky_1556 (bky): ...and then P2 has one extra drone but can buy one extra cluster.
[2020-05-19 21:35] awaclus: P2 has one extra drone and can buy one fewer cluster
[2020-05-19 21:36] awaclus: I think P2 needs Plexo to make it work

--- Thread (43 messages, 2020-05-19 to 2020-05-20) ---
[2020-05-19 23:52] matrix30815: I am getting frustrated, can't get no econ against the bots to work. they start attacking me faster then anything.
[2020-05-19 23:53] jeacaveo (jeacaveo (#NeverBrowserer)): that's gonna depend on the attacker, i saw you in game vs expert bot but had to leave and don't know how the game started
[2020-05-19 23:54] jeacaveo (jeacaveo (#NeverBrowserer)): can you send a replay so we can discuss specific openings?
[2020-05-19 23:54] .bky_1556 (bky): How literal is your "no econ"?
[2020-05-19 23:56] .bky_1556 (bky): It's very rare to have a playable line that doesn't involve buying any drones or alt-drones at all.
[2020-05-19 23:59] matrix30815: NJjpj-EjhOa < Here is my expert bot play
[2020-05-20 00:00] matrix30815: Got roasted and still having trouble understanding the way to get the econ going to attackers. Started attackers after the bot though
[2020-05-20 00:00] jeacaveo (jeacaveo (#NeverBrowserer)): ok, let me have a look, but maybe someone else can chip in
[2020-05-20 00:01] jeacaveo (jeacaveo (#NeverBrowserer)): first thing, as p2 (you didn't build a conduit on turn 2). that's called natural conduit and gives you a let up on tech
[2020-05-20 00:02] deadhour: Not sure if that was the most efficient use of Bloodrager
[2020-05-20 00:02] matrix30815: I read the openings but fully didn't understand them
[2020-05-20 00:02] deadhour: But you made it work
[2020-05-20 00:02] jeacaveo (jeacaveo (#NeverBrowserer)): you cut drones and started to tech up too fast, t3 you built 1 drone and blast + animus, that's a lot of tech for 12 drones in that set
[2020-05-20 00:02] deadhour: Instinctively I would've gone for Plasmifier in this set
[2020-05-20 00:02] matrix30815: I wasn't going to but saw the last bot do it so I tried it
[2020-05-20 00:03] .bky_1556 (bky): You were overteched, yeah.
[2020-05-20 00:03] jeacaveo (jeacaveo (#NeverBrowserer)): if you were going for bloodrager, instead of the 2nd set of Tarsiers, maybe go for 1 rhino so you can pump a rager out the turn the first Tarsiers came online
[2020-05-20 00:06] matrix30815: What do you mean overteched
[2020-05-20 00:06] .bky_1556 (bky): The wall on turn 6 was almost certainly a mistake; you wouldn't need it right away, and could instead spend the resources on something immediately useful like a Cauterizer.
[2020-05-20 00:06] .bky_1556 (bky): Overteched = wasting colored resources and/or accumulating useless gaussite, because you don't have the gold to spend it all.
[2020-05-20 00:07] .bky_1556 (bky): It's fine if you're slightly overteched to give yourself options, or to afford a single unit that's powerful enough to make up for it.
[2020-05-20 00:08] matrix30815: I feel like i can't win a game expect for lower bots and i want to win the master bot someday
[2020-05-20 00:09] .bky_1556 (bky): But you sunk 5 gold into a blastforge on turn 7 that you got no almost benefit from; you did buy a grenade mech, but there were less blue-intensive alternatives like buying a steelsplitter and the engineers to reactivate your cauterizer.
[2020-05-20 00:11] .bky_1556 (bky): Wasting 5 gold on turn 7 isn't necessarily game losing, but it's a pretty big error.
[2020-05-20 00:13] .bky_1556 (bky): In fact, you wasted red to buy the blastforge. It could have been another tarsier.
[2020-05-20 00:14] jeacaveo (jeacaveo (#NeverBrowserer)): I tried it vs master bot: wRgLB-Rme6l
[2020-05-20 00:14] jeacaveo (jeacaveo (#NeverBrowserer)): not saying that's optimal, but maybe you can take some pointers from it? just ask if you have any questions
[2020-05-20 00:14] jeacaveo (jeacaveo (#NeverBrowserer)): the hardest part is reading the set
[2020-05-20 00:17] jeacaveo (jeacaveo (#NeverBrowserer)): calculating how much gold you'll need to buy what you consier the best attacker + defense is one way to know when to stop making drones
[2020-05-20 00:17] matrix30815: What do you mean reading the set
[2020-05-20 00:17] deadhour: means looking at the set of random units and determining the optimal strategy
[2020-05-20 00:17] jeacaveo (jeacaveo (#NeverBrowserer)): determining what would be your 'endgame' strategy. again, @DeadHour is on the money
[2020-05-20 00:18] deadhour: knowing what are the best units you can buy in any given set is important because that will determine your most optimal opening
[2020-05-20 00:18] deadhour: how much econ you should get, what kind of tech and in what order, etc.
[2020-05-20 00:18] deadhour: efficiency is the name of the game
[2020-05-20 00:18] .bky_1556 (bky): Not just your endgame strategy, but also a workable path to an endgame tech and economy while getting useful things in the middle.
[2020-05-20 00:19] .bky_1556 (bky): However, I don't think set-reading exercises will be particularly useful for Matrix30815.
[2020-05-20 00:20] .bky_1556 (bky): I think you need to improve your turn-by-turn tactics first,
[2020-05-20 00:20] .bky_1556 (bky): get a better feel for how to use each unit,
[2020-05-20 00:20] .bky_1556 (bky): and the set-reading will follow from that.
[2020-05-20 00:20] deadhour: I think he should be focusing on basic opening theory
[2020-05-20 00:21] jeacaveo (jeacaveo (#NeverBrowserer)): same here, openings might help more. in my experience
[2020-05-20 00:21] .bky_1556 (bky): For example, looking at the replay, can you explain what you were trying to do with Cauterizer that game?

[2020-05-25 13:06] silentslayers: Assuming it is just wall absorb then holding old Odin is almost always correct. With new Odin I find it to be more interesting. I think most players just assume it is good to automatically consume a splitter, but I don’t think that’s the case. Only in fast sets. I also think the timing that you buy Odin is pretty interesting now in some sets
[2020-05-25 13:08] silentslayers: To answer the two questions about arka, yes you always want to click it versus vai, and yes you always want to click it if the opponent can arka. Obviously there are exceptions like anything else, but assuming it’s pretty simple to accomplish it, like wall wall forcefield/rhino that lives, it should be worth. Exception could be if the inflation is super low or it’s preventing some very key purchase from yourself if you try to click arka
